name: auto-codex
description: Conversation-mode wrapper around the Auto-Codex persistent autoresearch runtime.

interface.longDescription: Bootstrap, inspect, and steer a persistent autoresearch runtime from a single mission markdown, with on-disk state, job tracking, and Feishu reporting.
defaultPrompt: Start Auto-Codex from my autoresearch.md mission.
Show the current Auto-Codex plan and latest progress.
Send a new direction into the active Auto-Codex runtime.
